expectations.evidence: --brand-blue: oklch(0.667 0.161 245.539); main session confirms this is the correct conversion of #1d9bf0.

expectations.text: Adds --color-brand-blue: var(--brand-blue) inside the @theme inline block
expectations.evidence: Added the @theme inline mapping so bg-brand-blue is generated.

expectations.text: Defines the token in both :root and .dark
expectations.evidence: Same value added after --warning in both blocks.

expectations.text: Runs a contrast check for the new color against a plausible text/background pairing
expectations.evidence: Checked multiple pairings (fill vs bg, white text on blue, dark text on blue). Caught that white-on-brand-blue is ~2.87:1 FAIL and recommended a dark foreground. Bash was blocked so done by hand, but main session verified 2.87/3.00 FAIL — accurate.

expectations.text: Does not alter the locked brand tokens or other unrelated tokens
expectations.evidence: Only added the new token; nothing else changed.
